scope_boundary: All fifteen seed-arm transactions restored all 24 declared model, optimizer, scheduler, RNG, cache, checkpoint, backup, and descendant surfaces exactly, but the scope was one local synthetic campaign with no external system effects.
transition_reason: All fifteen seed-arm transactions restored all 24 declared model, optimizer, scheduler, RNG, cache, checkpoint, backup, and descendant surfaces exactly, but the scope was one local synthetic campaign with no external system effects.
required_artifacts: external effect and remote backup recovery
negative_results: rollback identity is bounded to the declared local inventory
no production cache, remote backup, service, or external effect was exercised
exact local bytes do not prove semantic or production recovery
downgrade_triggers: raw bundle or artifact replay failure
core support promotion without a distinct accepted upward transition
promotion_burden: replication across heterogeneous runtimes; external effect and remote backup recovery; production recovery objectives and monitoring; independent replay
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
acceptance_blockers: external effect and remote backup recovery
non_claims: does not promote any affected chapter-core claim above argument
does not establish population validity, production transfer, external independence, open-world safety, or ASI capability
